rulings.Case Title: JEFF BRADSHAW VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Warren Pumps, Llcs Motion For Protective Order Re: Additional Time To Depose Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, June 29, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT CARQUEST CORPORATION's Joinder To Defendant Warren Pumps, LLC's Motion For Protective Order Re: Additional Time To Depose Plaintiff. Defendant Warren Pumps¿ motion for a protective order for additional time to depose plaintiff and all joinders thereto are granted. All named defendants may have additional time for Mr. Bradshaw¿s deposition up to a total (including time already elapsed) of 30 hours. Plaintiff¿s opposition acknowledges the need for additional deposition time by stating that ¿The remaining information left to cover in deposition is the rest of the automotive friction work for Mr. Bradshaw, client specific questions for defendants, and Mr. Bradshaw¿s medical history and damages.¿ Given the number of defendants in the case, the request for ten additional hours beyond that specified in GO 129 is reasonable. The parties are to meet and confer regarding scheduling in an effort to reduce the discomfort to Mr. Bradshaw of the additional deposition hours. Because this case was filed over two and a half years ago, the request that plaintiff disclose any intent to sue additional defendants is also granted. = (220/HEK)
